author: Sameh M.
pros: Huge time saver, very easy to use, keeps everyone on the same page.
cons: Can't have more than one admin, can't change the only admin.

author: Luba V.
pros: Simple and easy to use. Just needed a simple platform to help keep track of employees days off requests, and it gets the job done for a low price.
cons: Overall notes for improvement. Our companies needs are fairly simple and we make it work the way it is, but some of these updates could help improve the overall platform: Give Employer/Manager ability to edit a date or request without emailing/notifying the employee. Note Holidays or WFH days on calendar, but still give employees ability to request those days off. Update calendar layout to mimic other standard calendars (Sunday, Monday, Tuesday,.. versus Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday...). Has caused some employee errors when submitting requests Give employees the ability to update their request submissions before they are approved (i.e. if they submit an incorrect date, change their mind)

review_title: Works but with a few shortcomings
description: It would be great if the shortcomings were taken care of and the Outlook integration was available. As it is right now its lacking.
author: Jim A.
pros: The ability to have several different types of leave is helpful in our organization.
cons: The balances in some views are incorrect. If an employee starts during the year and not at the start of the year their accrual is incorrect and has to be calculated manually. Really need to have integration with Outlook in order
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The double check of supervisor and leader was very important for strategic planning
author: Nelson C.
pros: *To be able to have all the equipment with the information of all the days free of my team.* Make my own free day request for professional and personal management.*poder buscar un espacio para tu dia libre es importante para la gestion de Asignaciones al equipo
cons: nothing because I use everything and I think it’s great!

review_title: Pros and Cons based on your needs
author: Jennah G.
pros: It is a great visual dashboard if you need a quick overview of who is off and when, it is easy for employees to input their own time so there is less management oversight required
cons: When requesting leave the week starts on Monday instead of Sunday so employees are often requesting the wrong day due to the calendar being incorrectly formatted, it also does not have any kind of app for phone access without having to log into your browser

review_title: Great system to track time off
description: Having a way to track everything has been SO helpful for our office
author: Hayley A.
pros: Day-off is incredibly user friendly and has been the only way our agency has been able to keep up with employee time off/sick leave
cons: Only thing I wish Day-off offered was a request to increase catergories by the employee. For example, we have unlimited sick days but I usually only have the bank at 10 until those have been met. Would be nice if the employee could request an increase

description: Day-off was easy to implement and our team members have insight to PTO without having to ask the HR team.
author: Timi F.
pros: This product has simplified our PTO tracking.
cons: You have to enter holidays for every location, you cannot copy them from one location to another.

description: Overall, this has been a great solution for my small business.
author: Tracy B.
pros: My team love being able to request time off using the mobile app and to be able to see available PTO in real time. My managers like being able to see all employees' scheduled time off on a single calendar. Price is very reasonable for small business.
cons: We occasionally get logged out of the mobile app and have difficulty logging back in. I also wish there were more support tools since there is no live support offered.

review_title: User friendly and perfect for a small non-profit
description: This app is solving our communication gap between staff and it effortlessly keeping track of staff’s days off which was not happening before.
author: Bethany M.
pros: Customization of leave types, built in communication when staff request off, and tracking of time off for admins to view.
cons: I use the free version and love it as it does what I need it to do. I feel like Day-off paid version would have even more!

description: Its been good. They have expanded the product to make it more usable for our teams with different holidays and custom time off such as birthday time off.
author: Sean B.
pros: We love the ability to easily add and manage employees time off. We have multiple teams world wide and this allows for multiple holidays for different teams.
cons: It still needs more integrations with other products such as O365 so it can add employees to the company calendar instead of having multiple things to look at.

review_title: Day Off is one of the best Programs to use
author: Tim W.
pros: I loved how easy it is to set up and to use throughout the year. The request comes to me via email and I easily go online to check if anyone else has the day and then accept or deny the request within a 60 seconds.
cons: When they add the capabilities of going to Microsoft Outlook calendar that would be a big help.

description: IT software was great for our initial needs, but we have moved to a more comprehensive all-inclusive software.
author: Mike S.
pros: Easy to use and deploy to staff. Approvals are simple
cons: Lacks other HR features that is needed when trying to run a full HR department

review_title: An easy way to keep track of my team
description: Excellent, solved the problem I was hoping to, and freed up time and resource and made the Leafyard team grow faster.I really love that it integrates with my calendar, and the email nudges that allow me to easily approve days off
author: Caroline W.
pros: Reduces time and makes planned leave more visible for everyone, easy to track, approve and plan
cons: Could be simpler - a few unnecessary features

review_title: Day-off is a great solution to your small business for vacation tracking
description: overall i am pleased and will continue to use it.
author: Chad H.
pros: This app is a very low-cost way to track vacation time for all of my employees and allows them to track their one-time as well.
cons: i would love for it to have a little more customization as well. some of the terminology takes a little getting used to to know how to apply it to situation.

description: It has made my job much easier managing employees in my small company. It is easy for them to request and track their own days from their computer or phone. The ease of use is huge for me as I don't have time to figure out complicated software.
author: Jarryd N.
pros: It is easy to use and has a great UI for myself and my team, they are able to manage their own PTO simply.
cons: Nothing - all concerns that I initially had have since been fixed through software updates.

review_title: an application that makes your work easier
author: Irena T.
pros: it is easy to use, and really great mobile app.
cons: Holidays cannot be separated somehow for each employee. Not every country holiday is for everyone.

review_title: Helps a Small Business Stay On Top of Time off
author: Vitold G.
pros: Ease of setup. Ease of use. And most importantly, tracks employee time off and allows us to avoid vacation overlaps that can lead to loss of productivity.
cons: No complaints so far.Would like the option to have sick days go into negatives, in the event of unusual use of sickdays.

author: Chet K.
pros: The ability to track time off accruals and use over 20 employees is simple.
cons: The reporting can be a little fickle, and takes a little getting used to.

review_title: dayoff is great, easy to use
author: hailey J.
pros: i liked how easy it is to use and keep track of everyones time off
cons: it would be nice to split days off without having to create a new one for each day.

author: Christina S.
pros: I really like the ease of use for both employees and administrators.
cons: I wish when employees leave, there was a way to archive them rather than delete them.

description: It's been amazing and saved me so much time as a manager.
author: Teri A.
pros: Time saving and accountability. Employees are able to do everything on their own and I don't have to track via a spreadsheet anymore.
cons: Have not found anything yet , It meets all my needs and it's simple.

author: Andrew I.
pros: The ease of use when requesting days off and approving.
cons: It has been good for what we need to use it for.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Mena E.
pros: user friendly, Easy, Accessible, does not need to train our staff on it, just a small session and everyone can use it
cons: nothing major everything needed is there
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Titko T.
pros: It's easy to use and its modern, works perfectly
cons: All is perfect for my usage. Everybody in the team love it.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Dave S.
pros: When you don’t have an HR department, this product works great to help keep track of your days off.
cons: Some of the custom features were not available.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
